options.name: <netGroupName>
options.description: Specifies name of the created net group name

options.name: -compact_area
options.description: Specifies that pins in the group are assigned tightly together.

options.name: -excludePin
options.description: {allLayer sameLayer allLayerInGuidedArea} Specifies that pins in the group exclude foreign pins on all layers or same layer.

options.name: -keep_out_spacing
options.description: Specifies minimum spacing between the pins placed oustide of this group, in number of tracks or pitch.

options.name: -mixed_signal
options.description: Specifies to identify mixed signal group.

options.name: -net
options.description: Specifies name of the net(s), wildcard can be specified

options.name: -optimizeOrder
options.description: Pins in the group are reordered to optimize wire length.

options.name: -spacing
options.description: Specifies minimum spacing between the pins of the net group

options.name: -spreadPin
options.description: Specifies that pins in the group are distributed evenly.
